mechanics.excerpt: In the Lyran Alliance_ cost IS even more 0l an Issue _ with top quality education through the university level generally available only to the wealthy: The basic Lyran Alllance The currency the Lyran Alliance and the Lyran Commonwealth before it, is the kroner (symbol: K or Sbill}: Each kroner is subdivided into 100 pfennigs_ Most major trans- actions are carried out electronically; but notes and coins remain common Coins exist in 1, and 10 pfennig denomina tions made of copper alloy; 25 and 50 pfennig_ made of silver alloy ; and and kroner; of Eold alloy: All coins are minted 0n Tharkad, with the Steiner emblem on one side and the Archon'$ image on the other: Paper notes exist for 5 10, 50, 100, 500, 1,000 and 10,000 kroner; all of which are color-coded and read: ily distinguishable.
